data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY
REASON: São Bernardo's high PPG (2.6) conflicts with their underdog odds (3.9). CRB's high xG (2.12) suggests strong attacking potential, yet their PPG (1.2) is moderate. Outcome bets (1X2) are unreliable due to conflicting data.
CONCLUSION: Home Team +1.5 Over Goals.
